if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'postgresql'
dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'postgresql'

mapper.select: select parentPos.code as parentCode, curPos.id, curPos.code, curPos.name, curPos.valid, curPos.modify_time as modifyTime, curPos.description, curPos.full_path as fullPath, curPos.lay_no as layNo, curPos.sort, dept.code as deptCode, dept.name as deptName, company.code as companyCode, company.full_name as companyFullName, company.short_name as companyShortName from org_position curPos left join org_position parentPos on curPos.parent_id = parentPos.id left join org_department dept on curPos.dep_id = dept.id left join org_company company on curPos.company_id = company.id where curPos.valid =1 and curPos.code = #{positionCode}
select code,name from org_position where dep_id = #{deptId} and valid = 1

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'postgresql'

select.if:
select pos.id, pos.code, pos.name, pos.valid, pos.full_path as fullPath, parentPos.code as parentCode, dept.code as deptCode, dept.name as deptName, company.code as companyCode, company.full_name as companyFullName, company.short_name as companyShortName from org_position pos left join org_company company on pos.company_id = company.id left join org_department dept on pos.dep_id = dept.id left join org_position parentPos on pos.parent_id = parentPos.id where pos.company_id = #{companyId} and pos.valid = 1 order by pos.lay_no, pos.sort
limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
